By utilizing an addition tree instead of a conventional adder, the implementation significantly reduces both area and power consumption, optimizing the efficiency of TPU. Additionally, the BM1684X processor incorporates a 64-input, 64-output, 8-bit crossbar within the lane, facilitating high-performance data gathering. This crossbar design enhances data gathering capabilities, enabling efficient data processing and manipulation within the TPU architecture. Furthermore, BM1684X offers three distinct memory access modes, showing the processor's versatility in addressing a wide range of AI processing needs and optimizing DRAM utilization for various tasks and workloads. Finally, we design a TPU-MLIR toolchain, highlighting its rich features such as unified processing of multiple frameworks, hierarchical design of model abstractions, correctness guarantees, and traceability of each transformation step. BM1684X excels in providing high-performance computing for a variety of AI models including large models, demonstrating its capabilities through comprehensive evaluations with industry-leading peers.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 BM1684X，这是 SOPHGO 的一款尖端 AI 处理器，旨在满足广泛 AI 应用的苛刻要求。首先，我们采用非常大数据宽度的SIMD架构来设计我们的TPU，以减少指令单元的面积比例，并大大提高计算能力密度。其次，欧盟内部定制特殊加速指令，实现动态流水线执行，从而减少指令总数和执行时间。这种定制增强了 TPU 在处理 RQ 和 DQ 操作时的性能，这对于 AI 计算至关重要。第三，TPU内的CUBE数组实现了特征图通道维度上64对INT8操作数的乘法和加法运算。通过利用加法树而不是传统的加法器，该实施显着减少了面积和功耗，优化了 TPU 的效率。此外，BM1684X 处理器在通道内集成了 64 输入、64 输出、8 位交叉开关，有助于高性能数据收集。这种交叉设计增强了数据收集能力，从而在 TPU 架构内实现高效的数据处理和操作。此外，BM1684X 提供三种不同的内存访问模式，展示了该处理器在满足广泛的 AI 处理需求以及优化各种任务和工作负载的 DRAM 利用率方面的多功能性。最后，我们设计了一个TPU-MLIR工具链，突出了其丰富的功能，例如多个框架的统一处理、模型抽象的分层设计、正确性保证以及每个转换步骤的可追溯性。 BM1684X擅长为包括大型模型在内的多种AI模型提供高性能计算，通过与业界领先同行的综合评估展示了其能力。

items.title: Stellar: An Automated Design Framework for Dense and Sparse Spatial Accelerators.
items.abstract: Domain-specific hardware, coupled with co-designed algorithmic optimizations, plays a pivotal role in accelerating both dense and sparse workloads, surpassing the capability of general-purpose platforms. However, the diverse nature of these specialized hardware platforms makes it challenging to systematically implement, evaluate, and compare different solutions. To address these shortcomings, we introduce Stellar, a novel accelerator design framework tailored for dense and sparse spatial accelerators. Stellar introduces abstractions that systematically decouple different dimensions of accelerator design, addressing the need for a clear separation of concerns for automated design solutions. This modular approach enhances the clarity and flexibility of the design process, while enabling automated hardware generation for a range of dense and sparse accelerator designs. Stellar outputs synthesizable Verilog implementations of these accelerators, paired with RISC-V programming interfaces. We demonstrate that Stellar-generated accelerators are comparable to hand-written, high-quality hardware designs, enabling effective evaluation, comparison, and design-space exploration for both dense and sparse accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 特定领域的硬件与共同设计的算法优化相结合，在加速密集和稀疏工作负载方面发挥着关键作用，超越了通用平台的能力。然而，这些专用硬件平台的多样性使得系统地实施、评估和比较不同的解决方案变得具有挑战性。为了解决这些缺点，我们引入了 Stellar，这是一种专为密集和稀疏空间加速器量身定制的新型加速器设计框架。 Stellar 引入了抽象，可以系统地解耦加速器设计的不同维度，满足自动化设计解决方案明确关注点分离的需求。这种模块化方法增强了设计过程的清晰度和灵活性，同时能够自动生成一系列密集和稀疏加速器设计的硬件。 Stellar 输出这些加速器的可综合 Verilog 实现，并与 RISC-V 编程接口配对。我们证明，Stellar 生成的加速器可与手写的高质量硬件设计相媲美，从而能够对密集和稀疏加速器进行有效的评估、比较和设计空间探索。

items.title: Cambricon-M: A Fibonacci-Coded Charge-Domain SRAM-Based CIM Accelerator for DNN Inference.
items.abstract: Charge-domain SRAM-based Computing-in-memory (CIM) proves to be a promising method for DNN inference, and benefits from avoiding data movement between computing units and memory. However, the high resolution Analog-to-Digital Converters (ADCs) dominates the energy consumption (up to 64%), limiting the energy efficiency of SRAM-CIM architectures. The main reason is the wide range of input analog values, requiring high resolution ADCs to convert the high precision averaged analog voltages into high bitwidth digital data. In this paper, to reduce the ADC overhead, we propose Cambricon-M, a novel Fibonacci-coded SRAM-based charge-domain CIM accelerator for DNN inference. Cambricon-M features the Fibonacci coding, which guarantees low density of ‘1’ in operands (i.e., the adjacent two bits of each ‘1’ are both ‘0’), narrowing the output voltage range and enabling low resolution ADCs. Further, Cambricon-M exploits the high bit-level sparsity to address the extra energy and area overhead caused by the larger bitwidth in Fibonacci coding. Specifically, Cambricon-M proposes zero-skipping methods to reduce ineffectual input/output, and the bit-slice based compression method to reduce memory capacity/bandwidth pressure. Experimental results show that Cambricon-M reduces ADC energy by 68.7%, and improves the energy efficiency 3.48× and 1.62× compared to TPUv4 and an ISAAC-based charge-domain SRAM-CIM accelerator.
items.abstract_zh: 基于电荷域 SRAM 的内存计算 (CIM) 被证明是一种很有前途的 DNN 推理方法，并且受益于避免计算单元和内存之间的数据移动。然而，高分辨率模数转换器 (ADC) 在能耗中占主导地位（高达 64%），限制了 SRAM-CIM 架构的能效。主要原因是输入模拟值范围很广，需要高分辨率ADC将高精度平均模拟电压转换为高位宽数字数据。在本文中，为了减少 ADC 开销，我们提出了 Cambricon-M，这是一种用于 DNN 推理的新型基于斐波那契编码 SRAM 的电荷域 CIM 加速器。 Cambricon-M采用斐波那契编码，可保证操作数中“1”的低密度（即每个“1”的相邻两位均为“0”），从而缩小输出电压范围并支持低分辨率ADC。此外，Cambricon-M 利用高位级稀疏性来解决斐波那契编码中较大位宽引起的额外能量和面积开销。具体来说，Cambricon-M提出了零跳跃方法来减少无效的输入/输出，以及基于位片的压缩方法来减少内存容量/带宽压力。实验结果表明，与TPUv4和基于ISAAC的电荷域SRAM-CIM加速器相比，Cambricon-M可降低ADC能耗68.7%，能效分别提高3.48倍和1.62倍。

items.title: Generalizing Ray Tracing Accelerators for Tree Traversals on GPUs.
items.abstract: Tree traversal is a fundamental operation in many applications, such as database indexing and physics simulations. Although tree traversals feature high parallelism, they are inherently divergent and irregular, leading to inefficient performance on GPUs. Tree traversals are also prevalent in ray tracing, which is executed on dedicated Ray-Tracing Accelerators (RTAs) in modern GPUs to mitigate inefficiencies such as control flow divergence and underutilization of memory bandwidth by irregular memory accesses. In this paper, we propose the Tree Traversal Accelerator (TTA) to replicate the success of RTAs in ray tracing for general tree traversal applications. TTAs extend RTAs to support tree structures and operations beyond those in ray tracing, such as B- Tree search and radius search algorithms, by modifying existing computing units. Despite TTAs' effectiveness, they still rely on fixed-function computations, making it challenging to support other tree-based applications such as N-Body simulation fully. Thus, we introduce TTA + as an alternative design, which modularizes the RTA computing units and makes them programmable, trading some efficiency for flexibility. With less than 1 % increase in RTA area, our proposals can achieve up to S.4x speedup for B-Tree search, 1.7x for N-Body simulation, and 1.2x for select ray-tracing applications.
items.abstract_zh: 树遍历是许多应用程序中的基本操作，例如数据库索引和物理模拟。虽然树遍历具有高并行性，但它们本质上是发散和不规则的，导致 GPU 性能低下。树遍历在光线追踪中也很普遍，它在现代 GPU 中的专用光线追踪加速器 (RTA) 上执行，以缓解控制流发散和不规则内存访问导致的内存带宽利用不足等低效率问题。在本文中，我们提出了树遍历加速器（TTA）来复制 RTA 在光线追踪中的成功，以用于一般的树遍历应用。 TTA 通过修改现有计算单元来扩展 RTA，以支持光线追踪之外的树结构和操作，例如 B 树搜索和半径搜索算法。尽管 TTA 很有效，但它们仍然依赖于固定功能计算，这使得完全支持其他基于树的应用程序（例如 N 体模拟）具有挑战性。因此，我们引入了 TTA+ 作为替代设计，它将 RTA 计算单元模块化并使其可编程，以牺牲一些效率换取灵活性。 RTA 面积增加不到 1%，我们的建议可为 B 树搜索实现高达 S.4 倍的加速，为 N 体模拟实现高达 1.7 倍的加速，为选定的光线追踪应用实现高达 1.2 倍的加速。

items.title: Bridging the Gap Between LLMs and LNS with Dynamic Data Format and Architecture Codesign.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have achieved tremendous success in the past few years. However, their training and inference demand exceptional computational and memory resources. Quantization has been shown as an effective approach to mitigate the cost, with the mainstream data types reduced from FP32 to FP16/BF16 and recently FP4 in the latest NVIDIA B100 GPUs. With increasingly aggressive quantization, however, the conventional floating-point formats suffer from limited precision in representing numbers around zero. Recently, NVIDIA demonstrated the potential of using a Logarithmic Number System (LNS) for the next generation of tensor cores. While LNS mitigates the hurdles in representing small numbers, in this work we observed a mismatch between LNS and the emerging Large Language Models (LLM), where LLM exhibits significant outliers when directly adopting the LNS format. In this paper, we present a data-format/architecture codesign to bright this gap. On the format side, we propose a dynamic LNS format to flexibly represent outliers at a higher precision, by exploiting asymmetry in the LNS representation and identifying outliers through a per-block basis. On the architecture side, for demonstration, we realize the dynamic LNS format in a systolic array, which can handle the irregularity of the outliers at runtime. We implement our approach on an Alveo U280 FPGA as a prototype. Experimental results show that our design can effectively handle the outliers and resolve the mismatch between LNS and LLM, contributing to an accuracy improvement of 15.4% and 16% over the floating-point and the original LNS baselines, with up to 15.3% over the state-of-the-art quantization methods using four LLM models. Our observation and design lay a solid foundation for the large-scale adoption of the LNS format in the next-generation deep learning hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在过去几年中取得了巨大的成功。然而，它们的训练和推理需要特殊的计算和内存资源。量化已被证明是降低成本的有效方法，主流数据类型从 FP32 减少到 FP16/BF16，最近在最新的 NVIDIA B100 GPU 中减少到 FP4。然而，随着量化的日益激进，传统的浮点格式在表示零附近的数字时精度有限。最近，NVIDIA 展示了在下一代张量核心中使用对数数字系统 (LNS) 的潜力。虽然 LNS 减轻了表示小数字的障碍，但在这项工作中，我们观察到 LNS 与新兴的大型语言模型 (LLM) 之间的不匹配，其中 LLM 在直接采用 LNS 格式时表现出明显的异常值。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据格式/架构协同设计来弥补这一差距。在格式方面，我们提出了一种动态 LNS 格式，通过利用 LNS 表示中的不对称性并通过每个块识别异常值，以更高精度灵活地表示异常值。在架构方面，为了演示，我们在脉动数组中实现了动态LNS格式，它可以处理运行时异常值的不规则性。我们在 Alveo U280 FPGA 上实现我们的方法作为原型。实验结果表明，我们的设计可以有效处理异常值并解决 LNS 和 LLM 之间的不匹配问题，与浮点和原始 LNS 基线相比，精度提高了 15.4% 和 16%，比使用四个 LLM 模型的最先进的量化方法提高了 15.3%。我们的观察和设计为下一代深度学习硬件中大规模采用LNS格式奠定了坚实的基础。

items.title: Low-Overhead General-Purpose Near-Data Processing in CXL Memory Expanders.
items.abstract: Emerging Compute Express Link (CXL) enables cost-efficient memory expansion beyond the local DRAM of processors. While its CXL.mem protocol provides minimal latency overhead through an optimized protocol stack, frequent CXL memory accesses can result in significant slowdowns for memory-bound applications whether they are latency-sensitive or bandwidth-intensive. The near-data processing (NDP) in the CXL controller promises to overcome such limitations of passive CXL memory. However, prior work on NDP in CXL memory proposes application-specific units that are not suitable for practical CXL memory-based systems that should support various applications. On the other hand, existing CPU or GPU cores are not cost-effective for NDP because they are not optimized for memory-bound applications. In addition, the communication between the host processor and CXL controller for NDP offloading should achieve low latency, but existing CXL.io/PCIe-based mechanisms incur $\mu\mathbf{s}-\mathbf{scale}$ latency and are not suitable for fine-grained NDP.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的 Compute Express Link (CXL) 可实现经济高效的内存扩展，超越处理器的本地 DRAM。虽然其 CXL.mem 协议通过优化的协议栈提供最小的延迟开销，但频繁的 CXL 内存访问可能会导致内存受限应用程序显着变慢，无论它们是延迟敏感型还是带宽密集型。 CXL 控制器中的近数据处理 (NDP) 有望克服无源 CXL 存储器的此类限制。然而，先前关于 CXL 存储器中的 NDP 的工作提出了特定于应用程序的单元，这些单元不适合应支持各种应用程序的实际基于 CXL 存储器的系统。另一方面，现有的 CPU 或 GPU 内核对于 NDP 来说并不经济高效，因为它们没有针对内存受限的应用程序进行优化。此外，用于 NDP 卸载的主机处理器和 CXL 控制器之间的通信应实现低延迟，但现有的基于 CXL.io/PCIe 的机制会产生 $\mu\mathbf{s}-\mathbf{scale}$ 延迟并且不适合细粒度的NDP。

items.title: Unleashing CPU Potential for Executing GPU Programs Through Compiler/Runtime Optimizations.
items.abstract: Although modern CPUs deliver high performance, they are often under-utilized in CPU-GPU heterogeneous systems. Enabling CPUs to execute GPU programs facilitates workload sharing between CPUs and GPUs, which can increase CPU device utilization and overall benefit heterogeneous systems. The flat collapsing transformation represents a state-of-the-art solution for GPU-to-CPU migration and is widely accepted in both academic and commercial projects. However, in this paper, we identify that CPU programs transformed by flat collapsing transformation are not compatible with standard CPU compiler optimizations and runtime environments, which leads to suboptimal performance. Based on the observation, we propose four compiler/runtime optimizations. These optimizations complement flat collapsing transformation and help generate high-performance programs. Our evaluations demonstrate an average performance improvement of 20.84% over the state-of-the-art framework on an x86 CPU and 16.10% on an ARM CPU.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管现代 CPU 提供高性能，但它们在 CPU-GPU 异构系统中往往未得到充分利用。使CPU能够执行GPU程序有利于CPU和GPU之间的工作负载共享，这可以提高CPU设备利用率和异构系统的整体效益。扁平折叠转换代表了 GPU 到 CPU 迁移的最先进的解决方案，并在学术和商业项目中被广泛接受。然而，在本文中，我们发现通过平面折叠转换转换的CPU程序与标准CPU编译器优化和运行时环境不兼容，从而导致性能不佳。根据观察，我们提出了四种编译器/运行时优化。这些优化补充了平面折叠转换，并有助于生成高性能程序。我们的评估表明，与最先进的框架相比，x86 CPU 的平均性能提高了 20.84%，ARM CPU 的平均性能提高了 16.10%。

items.title: Self-Managing DRAM: A Low-Cost Framework for Enabling Autonomous and Efficient DRAM Maintenance Operations.
items.abstract: The memory controller is in charge of managing DRAM maintenance operations (e.g., refresh, RowHammer protection, memory scrubbing) to reliably operate modern DRAM chips. Implementing new maintenance operations often necessitates modifications in the DRAM interface, memory controller, and potentially other system components. Such modifications are only possible with a new DRAM standard, which takes a long time to develop, likely leading to slow progress in the adoption of new architectural techniques in DRAM chips. We propose a new low-cost DRAM architecture, Self-Managing DRAM (SMD), that enables autonomous in-DRAM maintenance operations by transferring the responsibility for controlling main-tenance operations from the memory controller to the SMD chip. To enable autonomous maintenance operations, we make a single, simple modification to the DRAM interface, such that an SMD chip rejects memory controller accesses to DRAM regions (e.g., a subarray or a bank) under maintenance, while allowing memory accesses to other DRAM regions. Thus, SMD enables 1) implementing new in-DRAM maintenance mechanisms (or modifying existing ones) with no further changes in the DRAM interface, memory controller, or other system components, and 2) overlapping the latency of a maintenance operation in one DRAM region with the latency of accessing data in another. We evaluate SMD and show that it 1) can be implemented without adding new pins to the DDRx interface with low latency (0.4% of row activation latency) and area (1.1% of a 45.5 mm2 DRAM chip) overhead, 2) achieves 4.1 % average speedup across 20 four-core memory-intensive workloads over a DDR4-based system/-DRAM co-design technique that intelligently parallelizes main-tenance operations with memory accesses, and 3) guarantees for-ward progress for rejected memory accesses. We believe and hope SMD can enable innovations in DRAM architecture to rapidly come to fruition. We open source all SMD source code and data at https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/SelfManagingDRAM.
items.abstract_zh: 内存控制器负责管理 DRAM 维护操作（例如刷新、RowHammer 保护、内存清理），以可靠地运行现代 DRAM 芯片。实施新的维护操作通常需要修改 DRAM 接口、内存控制器和其他潜在的系统组件。此类修改只有通过新的 DRAM 标准才能实现，而新标准的开发需要很长时间，可能会导致 DRAM 芯片采用新架构技术的进程缓慢。我们提出了一种新的低成本 DRAM 架构，即自管理 DRAM (SMD)，它通过将控制维护操作的责任从内存控制器转移到 SMD 芯片来实现自主的 DRAM 内维护操作。为了实现自主维护操作，我们对 DRAM 接口进行了一次简单的修改，使得 SMD 芯片拒绝内存控制器访问正在维护的 DRAM 区域（例如，子阵列或存储体），同时允许内存访问其他 DRAM 区域。因此，SMD 能够：1) 实现新的 DRAM 内维护机制（或修改现有机制），而无需进一步更改 DRAM 接口、内存控制器或其他系统组件；2) 将一个 DRAM 区域中的维护操作的延迟与另一 DRAM 区域中的数据访问延迟重叠。我们评估了 SMD 并表明，它 1) 无需向 DDRx 接口添加新引脚即可实现，具有低延迟（行激活延迟的 0.4%）和面积（45.5 mm2 DRAM 芯片的 1.1%）开销，2) 与基于 DDR4 的系统/DRAM 协同设计技术相比，可在 20 个四核内存密集型工作负载中实现 4.1% 的平均加速，该技术可智能地将维护操作与内存访问并行化，并且3) 保证被拒绝的内存访问的前进。我们相信并希望SMD能够使DRAM架构的创新迅速取得成果。我们在 https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/SelfManagingDRAM 开源所有 SMD 源代码和数据。

items.title: RTL2MμPATH: Multi-μPATH Synthesis with Applications to Hardware Security Verification.
items.abstract: The Check tools automate formal memory consistency model and security verification of processors by analyzing abstract models of microarchitectures, called μSPEC models. Despite the efficacy of this approach, a verification gap between μSPEC models, which must be manually written, and RTL limits the Check tools' broad adoption. Our prior work, called RTL2μSPEC, narrows this gap by automatically synthesizing formally verified μSPEC models from System Verilog implementations of simple processors. But, RTL2μSPEC assumes input designs where an instruction (e.g., a load) cannot exhibit more than one microarchitectural execution path (μPATH, e.g., a cache hit or miss path)-its single-execution-path assumption. In this paper, we first propose an automated approach and tool, called RTL2MμPATH, that resolves RTL2μSPEC's single-execution-path assumption. Given a System Verilog processor design, instruction encodings, and modest design metadata, RTL2MμPATH finds a complete set of formally verified μPATHS for each instruction. Next, we make an important observation: an instruction that can exhibit more than one μPATH strongly indicates the presence of a microarchitectural side channel in the input design. Based on this observation, we then propose an automated approach and tool, called Synthlc, that extends RTL2MμPATH with a symbolic information flow analysis to support synthesizing a variety of formally verified leakage contracts from System Verilog processor designs. Leakage contracts are foundational to state-of-the-art defenses against hardware side-channel attacks. SYnthlcis the first automated methodology for formally verifying hardware adherence to them.
items.abstract_zh: Check 工具通过分析微架构的抽象模型（称为 μSPEC 模型），自动执行形式内存一致性模型和处理器的安全验证。尽管这种方法很有效，但 μSPEC 模型（必须手动编写）和 RTL 之间的验证差距限制了检查工具的广泛采用。我们之前的工作称为 RTL2μSPEC，通过从简单处理器的 System Verilog 实现自动合成经过正式验证的 μSPEC 模型来缩小这一差距。但是，RTL2μSPEC 假设输入设计中一条指令（例如加载）不能呈现多于一个微架构执行路径（μPATH，例如缓存命中或未命中路径）——其单执行路径假设。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种称为 RTL2MμPATH 的自动化方法和工具，它解决了 RTL2μSPEC 的单执行路径假设。给定 System Verilog 处理器设计、指令编码和适度的设计元数据，RTL2MμPATH 会为每条指令找到一组完整的经过正式验证的 μPATH。接下来，我们做出一个重要的观察：一条可以表现出多个 μPATH 的指令强烈表明输入设计中存在微架构侧通道。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种名为 Synthlc 的自动化方法和工具，它通过符号信息流分析扩展了 RTL2MμPATH，以支持从 System Verilog 处理器设计综合各种形式验证的泄漏契约。泄漏合约是针对硬件侧通道攻击的最先进防御的基础。 SYNthl 是第一个用于正式验证硬件是否遵守这些规则的自动化方法。

items.title: PIFS-Rec: Process-In-Fabric-Switch for Large-Scale Recommendation System Inferences.
items.abstract: Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) have become increasingly popular and prevalent in today's datacenters, consuming most of the AI inference cycles. The performance of DLRMs is heavily influenced by available band-width due to their large vector sizes in embedding tables and concurrent accesses. To achieve substantial improvements over existing solutions, novel approaches towards DLRM optimization are needed, especially, in the context of emerging interconnect technologies like CXL. This study delves into exploring CXL-enabled systems, implementing a process-in-fabric-switch (PIFS) solution to accelerate DLRMs while optimizing their memory and bandwidth scalability. We present an in-depth characterization of industry-scale DLRM workloads running on CXL-ready systems, identifying the predominant bottlenecks in existing CXL systems. We, therefore, propose PIFS-Rec, a PIFS-based scheme that implements near-data processing through downstream ports of the fabric switch. PIFS-Rec achieves a latency that is 3.89 x lower than Pond, an industry-standard CXL-based system, and also outperforms BEACON, a state-of-the-art scheme, by 2.03x.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM) 在当今的数据中心中变得越来越流行和普遍，消耗了大部分人工智能推理周期。由于嵌入表和并发访问中的矢量大小较大，DLRM 的性能很大程度上受到可用带宽的影响。为了实现对现有解决方案的实质性改进，需要新的 DLRM 优化方法，特别是在 CXL 等新兴互连技术的背景下。本研究深入探索支持 CXL 的系统，实施结构交换处理 (PIFS) 解决方案以加速 DLRM，同时优化其内存和带宽可扩展性。我们对在 CXL 就绪系统上运行的行业规模 DLRM 工作负载进行了深入的描述，确定了现有 CXL 系统中的主要瓶颈。因此，我们提出了PIFS-Rec，这是一种基于PIFS的方案，通过Fabric交换机的下游端口实现近数据处理。 PIFS-Rec 的延迟比基于 CXL 的行业标准系统 Pond 低 3.89 倍，并且比最先进的方案 BEACON 低 2.03 倍。

items.title: CamPU: A Multi-Camera Processing Unit for Deep Learning-based 3D Spatial Computing Systems.
items.abstract: A 3D spatial computing system that understands a surrounding environment and interacts with real-world objects has emerged with the development of deep learning technologies. A multi-camera system captures a surrounding view of a scene using multiple cameras, and a deep neural network (DNN) system extracts semantic features from multi-camera images and provides useful information to users. However, processing a multi-camera system requires massive memory accesses as the number of cameras increases while processing a DNN system can improve throughput by exploiting batch processing. This performance gap limits the overall performance of 3D spatial computing systems. To solve this problem, a multi-camera processing unit (CamPU) is proposed. CamPU exploits the inter- and intra-data reuse methods on multi-camera images, minimizing memory accesses for image projection. Moreover, the out-of-order image projection unit with cache memory is designed to increase multi-image projection throughput by avoiding redundant cache accesses and hiding the latency of high-level memory accesses. Lastly, the overlap-aware blending unit speeds up image blending by efficiently handling overlapping regions between adjacent images. The CamPU architecture is evaluated through RTL-level simulation, and the CamPU-integrated DNN platform provides a comprehensive analysis of end-to-end multi-camera deep learning-based 3D spatial systems. Finally, CamPU speedups the overall system performance 2.9 x faster than an NVIDIA RTX2080Ti GPU platform.
items.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习技术的发展，出现了一种能够理解周围环境并与现实世界物体交互的3D空间计算系统。多摄像头系统使用多个摄像头捕获场景的周围视图，深度神经网络（DNN）系统从多摄像头图像中提取语义特征并向用户提供有用的信息。然而，随着摄像机数量的增加，处理多摄像机系统需要大量内存访问，而处理 DNN 系统可以通过利用批处理来提高吞吐量。这种性能差距限制了 3D 空间计算系统的整体性能。为了解决这个问题，提出了多相机处理单元（CamPU）。 CamPU 在多相机图像上利用数据间和数据内重用方法，最大限度地减少图像投影的内存访问。此外，带有高速缓存的乱序图像投影单元旨在通过避免冗余高速缓存访​​问和隐藏高级内存访问的延迟来提高多图像投影吞吐量。最后，重叠感知混合单元通过有效处理相邻图像之间的重叠区域来加速图像混合。 CamPU架构通过RTL级仿真进行评估，CamPU集成的DNN平台提供对基于端到端多摄像头深度学习的3D空间系统的全面分析。最后，CamPU 的整体系统性能比 NVIDIA RTX2080Ti GPU 平台快 2.9 倍。

items.title: Pushing the Performance Envelope of DNN-based Recommendation Systems Inference on GPUs.
items.abstract: Personalized recommendation is a ubiquitous appli-cation on the internet, with many industries and hyperscalers extensively leveraging Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) for their personalization needs (like ad serving or movie suggestions). With growing model and dataset sizes pushing computation and memory requirements, GPUs are being increasingly preferred for executing DLRM inference. However, serving newer DLRMs, while meeting acceptable latencies, continues to remain challenging, making traditional deployments increasingly more GPU-hungry, resulting in higher inference serving costs. In this paper, we show that the embedding stage continues to be the primary bottleneck in the GPU inference pipeline, leading up to a 3.2 x embedding-only performance slowdown. To thoroughly grasp the problem, we conduct a detailed microarchitecture characterization and highlight the presence of low occupancy in the standard embedding kernels. By leveraging direct compiler optimizations, we achieve optimal occupancy, pushing the performance by up to 53 %. Yet, long memory latency stalls continue to exist. To tackle this challenge, we propose spe-cialized plug-and-play-based software prefetching and L2 pinning techniques, which help in hiding and decreasing the latencies. Further, we propose combining them, as they complement each other. Experimental evaluations using AI00 GPUs with large models and datasets show that our proposed techniques improve performance by up to 103% for the embedding stage, and up to 77 % for the overall D LRM inference pipeline.
items.abstract_zh: 个性化推荐是互联网上无处不在的应用程序，许多行业和超大规模企业广泛利用深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM) 来满足其个性化需求（例如广告服务或电影建议）。随着模型和数据集大小的不断增长，计算和内存需求不断增加，GPU 越来越成为执行 DLRM 推理的首选。然而，为较新的 DLRM 提供服务，同时满足可接受的延迟，仍然具有挑战性，这使得传统部署越来越需要 GPU，从而导致推理服务成本更高。在本文中，我们表明嵌入阶段仍然是 GPU 推理管道中的主要瓶颈，导致仅嵌入性能下降 3.2 倍。为了彻底解决这个问题，我们进行了详细的微架构表征，并强调了标准嵌入内核中存在的低占用率。通过利用直接编译器优化，我们实现了最佳占用率，将性能提升高达 53%。然而，长内存延迟停顿仍然存在。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了基于即插即用的专门软件预取和 L2 固定技术，这有助于隐藏和减少延迟。此外，我们建议将它们结合起来，因为它们是相辅相成的。使用 AI00 GPU 和大型模型和数据集进行的实验评估表明，我们提出的技术将嵌入阶段的性能提高了高达 103%，将整个 D LRM 推理管道的性能提高了 77%。

items.title: Demystifying a CXL Type-2 Device: A Heterogeneous Cooperative Computing Perspective.
items.abstract: CXL is the latest interconnect technology built on PCIe, providing three protocols to facilitate three distinct types of devices, each with unique capabilities. Among these devices, a CXL Type-2 device has become commercially available, followed by CXL Type-3 devices. Therefore, it is timely to understand capabilities and characteristics of the CXL Type-2 device, as well as explore suitable applications. In this work, first, we delve into three key features of a CXL Type-2 device: cache-coherent device accelerator to host memory, device accelerator to device memory, and host CPU to device memory accesses. Second, using microbenchmarks, we comprehensively characterize the latency and bandwidth of these memory accesses with a CXL Type-2 device, and then compare them with those of equivalent memory accesses with comparable devices, such as emulated CXL Type-2, CXL Type-3, and PCIe devices. Lastly, as applications that exploit the unique capabilities of a CXL Type-2 device, we propose two CXL-based Linux memory optimization features: compressed RAM cache for swap (zswap) and memory deduplication (ksm). Our evaluation shows that Redis, when running with traditional CPU-based zswap and ksm, suffers from a tail latency increase of 4.5-10.3× compared to Redis running alone. While PCIe-based zswap and ksm still experience a tail latency increase of up to 8.1×, CXL-based zswap and ksm practically eliminate the tail latency increase with faster and more efficient host-device communication than PCIe-based zswap and ksm.
items.abstract_zh: CXL 是基于 PCIe 的最新互连技术，提供三种协议来支持三种不同类型的设备，每种设备都具有独特的功能。在这些器件中，CXL Type-2 器件已投入商用，随后是 CXL Type-3 器件。因此，及时了解 CXL Type-2 器件的功能和特性，并探索合适的应用。在这项工作中，首先，我们深入研究了 CXL Type-2 设备的三个关键特性：主机内存的缓存一致性设备加速器、设备内存的设备加速器以及主机 CPU 到设备内存的访问。其次，使用微基准测试，我们全面表征了 CXL Type-2 设备的这些内存访问的延迟和带宽，然后将它们与可比设备（例如模拟的 CXL Type-2、CXL Type-3 和 PCIe 设备）的等效内存访问进行比较。最后，作为利用 CXL Type-2 设备独特功能的应用程序，我们提出了两种基于 CXL 的 Linux 内存优化功能：用于交换的压缩 RAM 缓存 (zswap) 和内存重复数据删除 (ksm)。我们的评估表明，当 Redis 与传统的基于 CPU 的 zswap 和 ksm 一起运行时，与单独运行的 Redis 相比，尾部延迟增加了 4.5-10.3 倍。虽然基于 PCIe 的 zswap 和 ksm 仍然会出现高达 8.1 倍的尾部延迟增加，但基于 CXL 的 zswap 和 ksm 几乎消除了尾部延迟的增加，与基于 PCIe 的 zswap 和 ksm 相比，主机设备通信更快、更高效。

items.title: A Compiler-Like Framework for Optimizing Cryptographic Big Integer Multiplication on GPUs.
items.abstract: With the growth of digital data and rising security concerns, techniques for privacy-preserving computation have become increasingly essential. Big integer multiplication, pivotal for these applications, is compute-intensive but poses challenges for GPU acceleration due to its complexity and the need for application-specific tailored implementations. This paper presents IMCompiler, a compiler-like framework that automatically gen-erates optimized GPU kernels for integer multiplications used in cryptosystems. It features a frontend-IR-backend structure, where the Intermediate Representation (IR) employs a segmented integer multiplication algorithm to decouple architecture-specific optimizations from high-level parameters. The frontend can then easily translate integer multiplication with various high-level parameters into the IR, while the backend focuses on fine-tuning a single GPU kernel for each device, enabling automatic code generation. Moreover, we introduce a computation diagram to facilitate the analysis of parallelization strategies, inspiring many optimizations, including two-dimensional parallelization, tailored caching strategy, index transposing, and lazy carrying. Experiments show that IMCompiler achieves a 4.47× speedup compared to the widely used baseline and 1.42 × over Nvidia's official library. The speedup will be even higher for larger integers and higher-capacity GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着数字数据的增长和安全问题的日益严重，隐私保护计算技术变得越来越重要。对于这些应用程序来说至关重要的大整数乘法是计算密集型的，但由于其复杂性和需要针对特定​​应用程序定制实现，给 GPU 加速带来了挑战。本文介绍了 IMCompiler，这是一个类似编译器的框架，可以自动为密码系统中使用的整数乘法生成优化的 GPU 内核。它具有前端-IR-后端结构，其中中间表示 (IR) 采用分段整数乘法算法将特定于架构的优化与高级参数解耦。然后，前端可以轻松地将具有各种高级参数的整数乘法转换为 IR，而后端则专注于为每个设备微调单个 GPU 内核，从而实现自动代码生成。此外，我们引入了计算图来方便分析并行化策略，启发许多优化，包括二维并行化、定制缓存策略、索引转置和惰性携带。实验表明，与广泛使用的基准相比，IMCompiler 实现了 4.47 倍的加速，比 Nvidia 官方库实现了 1.42 倍的加速。对于更大的整数和更高容量的 GPU，加速会更高。

items.title: Message from the MICRO 2024 Program Chairs.
items.abstract: It is our pleasure to present the technical program for MICRO 2024, the 57th ACM/IEEE International Symposium on Microarchitecture. This year's program features a wide variety of exciting topics representing the state of the art in computer architecture research. We had a record 497 submissions, an increase of 15& over last year. We accepted a record 113 papers. The reviewing process included 152 program committee (PC) members, 176 external review committee (ERC) members, and few other expert reviewers.
items.abstract_zh: 我们很高兴介绍第 57 届 ACM/IEEE 国际微架构研讨会 MICRO 2024 的技术方案。今年的计划涵盖了各种令人兴奋的主题，代表了计算机体系结构研究的最新技术水平。我们收到了创纪录的 497 份参赛作品，比去年增加了 15 份。我们接受了创纪录的 113 篇论文。评审过程包括 152 名程序委员会 (PC) 成员、176 名外部评审委员会 (ERC) 成员以及少数其他专家评审员。

items.title: Ghost Arbitration: Mitigating Interconnect Side-Channel Timing Attacks in GPU.
items.abstract: Network-on-chip (NoC) is a critical shared resource in scalable multicore processors; however, it is well-known that shared resources can lead to side-channel attacks. In this work, we demonstrate how contention for on-chip bandwidth in GPUs can lead to fine-grain information leakage and enable side-channel attacks. As a case study, we demonstrate how RSA key bit information can be leaked on a real GPU. We also describe how interconnect characteristics from the side-channel or an interconnect-gram can be used to fingerprint kernels executing on the GPU. To defend against such fine-grain side-channel attack, we propose secure arbitration that prevents information leakage while minimizing performance impact during normal execution. In particular, we present a novel ghost arbitration that prevents interconnect contention from being leveraged to leak information by keeping track of “ghost” requests or requests when other nodes receive free arbitration to enable least-recently-used priority. However, if the attacker reverse engineers the arbitration, a naive implementation of ghost arbitration can still lead to information leakage. Thus, we propose a weighted ghost arbitration that exploits “malicious” communication patterns to prevent information leakage with minimal loss in performance. Compared to previously proposed arbitration that is secure (e.g., strict time-division multiplexing), ghost arbitration is able to improve performance by up to $4\times$ •
items.abstract_zh: 片上网络 (NoC) 是可扩展多核处理器中的关键共享资源；然而，众所周知，共享资源可能导致旁道攻击。在这项工作中，我们演示了 GPU 中片上带宽的争用如何导致细粒度信息泄漏并启用旁路攻击。作为案例研究，我们演示了如何在真实 GPU 上泄露 RSA 密钥位信息。我们还描述了如何使用侧通道或互连图的互连特征来对 GPU 上执行的内核进行指纹识别。为了防御这种细粒度的侧通道攻击，我们提出了安全仲裁，可以防止信息泄漏，同时最大限度地减少正常执行期间的性能影响。特别是，我们提出了一种新颖的幽灵仲裁，通过跟踪“幽灵”请求或当其他节点接收免费仲裁以启用最近最少使用的优先级时的请求，可以防止互连争用被利用来泄漏信息。然而，如果攻击者对仲裁进行逆向工程，简单地实施幽灵仲裁仍然可能导致信息泄漏。因此，我们提出了一种加权幽灵仲裁，它利用“恶意”通信模式来防止信息泄漏，同时将性能损失降至最低。与之前提出的安全仲裁（例如严格的时分复用）相比，幽灵仲裁能够将性能提高高达 $4\times$ •

items.title: Uncovering Real GPU NoC Characteristics: Implications on Interconnect Architecture.
items.abstract: A critical component of high-throughput processors such as GPUs is the network-on-chip (NoC) that interconnects the large number of cores and the memory partitions together. In this work, we provide a detailed analysis, in terms of latency and bandwidth, of real GPU NoC across several generations of modern NVIDIA GPUs. Our analysis identifies how non-uniform latency exists between the cores and the memory partitions based on their physical location in the GPU. The non-uniformity can result in up to approximately 70 % difference in on-chip latency. In comparison, the bandwidth provided from the cores to the memory partitions is approximately uniform. However, recent GPUs that consist of multiple GPU “partitions” present different on-chip latency and bandwidth characteristics when communicating between the partitions. Based on our analysis of real GPU interconnect, we discuss potential implications including its impact on timing used in side-channel attacks as well as NoC microarchitectures. We show how the non-uniform latency can be exploited in a timing side-channel attack within a GPU as the core location impacts performance (or timing). In addition, proper understanding (and proper assumptions) of GPU NoC is critical to ensure a network that does not bottleneck the overall system performance.
items.abstract_zh: GPU 等高吞吐量处理器的关键组件是将大量内核和内存分区互连在一起的片上网络 (NoC)。在这项工作中，我们从延迟和带宽方面对几代现代 NVIDIA GPU 的真实 GPU NoC 进行了详细分析。我们的分析根据核心和内存分区在 GPU 中的物理位置确定了核心和内存分区之间如何存在不均匀延迟。这种不均匀性可能会导致片上延迟高达约 70% 的差异。相比之下，从核心向内存分区提供的带宽大致均匀。然而，最新的由多个 GPU“分区”组成的 GPU 在分区之间通信时呈现出不同的片上延迟和带宽特征。根据我们对真实 GPU 互连的分析，我们讨论了潜在的影响，包括其对侧通道攻击以及 NoC 微架构中使用的时序的影响。我们展示了如何在 GPU 内的定时侧通道攻击中利用非均匀延迟，因为核心位置会影响性能（或定时）。此外，对 GPU NoC 的正确理解（和正确假设）对于确保网络不会成为整体系统性能的瓶颈至关重要。

items.title: Message from the MICRO 2024 General Chairs: "Hi, How Are you?" - "Jeremiah The Innocent" Mural.
items.abstract: It is our pleasure and honor to welcome y'all to Austin for the 57th edition of the IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Microarchitecture 2024 (MICRO-57), the premier forum for presenting, discussing, and debating innovative microarchitecture ideas and techniques for advanced computing and communication systems. MICRO brings together researchers from around the world for technical exchange on traditional microarchitecture topics and emerging research areas in fields related to computer microarchitecture, compilers, computer chips, and computer systems.
items.abstract_zh: 我们很高兴和荣幸地欢迎大家来到奥斯汀参加 2024 年第 57 届 IEEE/ACM 国际微架构研讨会 (MICRO-57)，这是展示、讨论和辩论先进计算和通信系统的创新微架构理念和技术的首要论坛。 MICRO 汇聚了来自世界各地的研究人员，就计算机微架构、编译器、计算机芯片和计算机系统相关领域的传统微架构主题和新兴研究领域进行技术交流。

items.title: Concurrency-Aware Register Stacks for Efficient GPU Function Calls.
items.abstract: Since the early days of computers, dividing a program into functions or subroutines has been a common way to manage complexity. Functions make programs easier to read, facilitate code reuse, and provide clean interfaces for separate compilation. However, function calls incur runtime overhead. We quantify the impact of this runtime overhead on GPUs and demonstrate that the register spills/fills required to maintain the function call application binary interface place significant bandwidth and capacity pressure on shared resources. To alleviate this overhead, we introduce Concurrency-Aware Register Stacks (CARS), a hardware mechanism that re-purposes segments of the GPU register file as a software-controlled hardware stack. CARS exploits the regularity in function prologue/epilogues to rename registers pushed to the stack with linear base + offset addressing, similar to the baseline GPU. Informed by lightweight call graph analysis and dynamic function behavior, CARS balances the space devoted to register stacks with the concurrency required to hide latency in GPUs. Without harming function-free programs, CARS improves the performance and energy efficiency of 22 function-calling applications by 26% and 28%, respectively, outperforming idealized GPUs with impractical resources.
items.abstract_zh: 自计算机诞生以来，将程序划分为函数或子例程一直是管理复杂性的常用方法。函数使程序更易于阅读，促进代码重用，并为单独编译提供干净的接口。然而，函数调用会产生运行时开销。我们量化了这种运行时开销对 GPU 的影响，并证明了维护函数调用应用程序二进制接口所需的寄存器溢出/填充对共享资源造成了巨大的带宽和容量压力。为了减轻这种开销，我们引入了并发感知寄存器堆栈 (CARS)，这是一种硬件机制，可将 GPU 寄存器文件的各个段重新用作软件控制的硬件堆栈。 CARS 利用函数序言/结尾中的规律性，通过线性基地址+偏移寻址来重命名推送到堆栈的寄存器，类似于基线 GPU。根据轻量级调用图分析和动态函数行为，CARS 平衡了专用于寄存器堆栈的空间与隐藏 GPU 中的延迟所需的并发性。在不损害无函数程序的情况下，CARS 将 22 个函数调用应用程序的性能和能源效率分别提高了 26% 和 28%，优于具有不切实际资源的理想化 GPU。

items.title: Distributed Page Table: Harnessing Physical Memory as an Unbounded Hashed Page Table.
items.abstract: Virtual memory systems rely on the page table, a crucial component that maps virtual addresses to physical addresses (i.e., address translation). While the Radix Page Table (RPT) has traditionally been used for this task, its limitations have become more apparent with the rise of memory-intensive applications. Recently, Hashed Page Tables (HPTs) have been explored as an alternative page table structure to offer faster address translation. However, the HPT introduces its own set of challenges particularly in resizing the page table and allocating contiguous physical memory space for storing the table. To tackle the fundamental problem of the existing HPT designs, this paper introduces Distributed Page Table (DPT), a novel approach that utilizes the physical memory as a huge hashed page table. DPT distributes Page Table Entries (PTEs) across the entire physical memory space, significantly reducing the hash collisions while avoiding the table resizing overheads. When distributing the PTEs across the physical memory, they can be mapped to memory locations already allocated to data pages. This new type of collision, referred to as address collision, may reduce the effectiveness of the DPT. This paper showcases that the DPT can effectively resolve the address collision with three simple yet efficient techniques: Strided Open Addressing (SOA), Collision-Aware Virtual Address Allocation (CVA) and Collided Page Displacement (CPD). Our experimental results demonstrate that DPT achieves average performance improvements of 12.6%, 11.6%, and 8.7% compared to traditional RPT, the latest large-coverage TLB design, and state-of-the-art HPTs, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 虚拟内存系统依赖于页表，页表是将虚拟地址映射到物理地址（即地址转换）的关键组件。虽然基数页表 (RPT) 传统上用于此任务，但随着内存密集型应用程序的兴起，其局限性变得更加明显。最近，哈希页表 (HPT) 已被探索作为替代页表结构，以提供更快的地址转换。然而，HPT 引入了自己的一系列挑战，特别是在调整页表大小和分配连续物理内存空间来存储该表方面。为了解决现有 HPT 设计的根本问题，本文引入了分布式页表（DPT），这是一种利用物理内存作为巨大的哈希页表的新颖方法。 DPT 将页表条目 (PTE) 分布在整个物理内存空间中，显着减少哈希冲突，同时避免表大小调整开销。当将 PTE 分配到物理内存时，它们可以映射到已分配给数据页的内存位置。这种新型冲突（称为地址冲突）可能会降低 DPT 的有效性。本文展示了 DPT 可以通过三种简单而有效的技术有效解决地址冲突：跨步开放寻址 (SOA)、冲突感知虚拟地址分配 (CVA) 和冲突页面置换 (CPD)。我们的实验结果表明，与传统 RPT、最新的大覆盖 TLB 设计和最先进的 HPT 相比，DPT 的平均性能分别提高了 12.6%、11.6% 和 8.7%。

items.title: Memory Allocation Under Hardware Compression.
items.abstract: As the scaling of memory density slows physically, a promising solution is to scale memory logically by enhancing the CPU's memory controller to encode and store data more densely in memory. This is known as hardware memory compression. Hardware memory compression decouples OS-managed physical memory from actual memory (i.e., DRAM); the memory controller spends a dynamically varying amount of DRAM on each physical page, depending on the compressibility of the page's content. The newly-decoupled actual memory effectively forms a new layer of memory beyond the traditional layers of virtual, pseudo-physical, and physical memory. We note unlike these traditional memory layers, each with its own specialized allocation interface (e.g., malloc/mmap for virtual memory, page tables+MMU for physical memory), this new layer of memory introduced by hardware memory compression still awaits its own unique memory allocation interface; its absence makes the allocation of actual memory imprecise and, sometimes, even impossible. Imprecisely allocating less actual memory, and/or unable to allocate more, can harm performance. Even imprecisely allocating more actual memory to some jobs can be harmful as it can result in allocating less actual memory to other jobs in highly-occupied memory systems, where compression is useful. To restore precise memory allocation, we design a new memory allocation specialized for this new layer of memory and, subsequently, architect a new MMU-like component in the memory controller and tackle the corresponding design challenges. We create a full-system FPGA prototype of a hardware-compressed memory system with precise memory allocation. Our evaluations using the prototype show that jobs perform stably under colocation. The performance variation is only 1%-2%; in comparison, it is 19%-89% under the prior art.
items.abstract_zh: 随着内存密度的扩展在物理上减慢，一个有前途的解决方案是通过增强 CPU 的内存控制器以在内存中更密集地编码和存储数据来逻辑扩展内存。这称为硬件内存压缩。硬件内存压缩将操作系统管理的物理内存与实际内存（即 DRAM）解耦；内存控制器在每个物理页上使用动态变化的 DRAM 量，具体取决于页内容的可压缩性。新解耦的实际内存有效地形成了超越传统虚拟、伪物理和物理内存层的新内存层。我们注意到，与这些传统的内存层不同，每个内存层都有自己专门的分配接口（例如，虚拟内存的malloc/mmap，物理内存的页表+MMU），硬件内存压缩引入的这一新内存层仍然有自己独特的内存分配接口；它的缺失使得实际内存的分配不精确，有时甚至是不可能的。不精确地分配较少的实际内存和/或无法分配更多的内存可能会损害性能。即使不精确地为某些作业分配更多的实际内存也可能是有害的，因为它可能会导致在高占用内存系统中为其他作业分配更少的实际内存，而压缩在这些系统中很有用。为了恢复精确的内存分配，我们专门针对这一新的内存层设计了一种新的内存分配，随后在内存控制器中构建了一个新的类似 MMU 的组件，并解决了相应的设计挑战。我们创建了具有精确内存分配的硬件压缩内存系统的全系统 FPGA 原型。我们使用原型进行的评估表明，工作在托管环境下表现稳定。性能变化仅为1%-2%；相比之下，现有技术为19％-89％。

items.title: Terminus: A Programmable Accelerator for Read and Update Operations on Sparse Data Structures.
items.abstract: Sparse data structures like hash tables, trees, or compressed tensors are ubiquitous, but operations on these structures are expensive and inefficient on current systems. Prior work has proposed hardware acceleration for these operations, but these techniques have two key shortcomings: they limit the types of data structures they support, and they focus on reads but do not support fine-grained updates to these structures. We present Terminus, a programmable accelerator for read and update operations on sparse data structures. Terminus extends each general-purpose core with a programmable dataflow engine capable of accelerating a wide range of structures and operations. Terminus engines are flexible yet simple, as they focus on common operations and defer rare, complex ones to cores. Terminus features a simple concurrency control mechanism based on address ranges that enables safe updates while preserving parallelism. We evaluate Terminus on serial and parallel benchmarks on a wide range of sparse data structures. Terminus improves performance by gmean $7.4\times$ over a CPU baseline, showing that Terminus can accelerate fine-grained reads and writes that were previously not possible in prior accelerators for sparse structures.
items.abstract_zh: 哈希表、树或压缩张量等稀疏数据结构无处不在，但在当前系统上对这些结构进行操作既昂贵又低效。先前的工作提出了对这些操作的硬件加速，但这些技术有两个关键缺点：它们限制了它们支持的数据结构的类型，并且它们专注于读取但不支持对这些结构的细粒度更新。我们推出了 Terminus，这是一个可编程加速器，用于稀疏数据结构的读取和更新操作。 Terminus 通过可编程数据流引擎扩展了每个通用内核，该引擎能够加速各种结构和操作。 Terminus 引擎灵活而简单，因为它们专注于常见操作，并将罕见、复杂的操作推迟到核心。 Terminus 具有基于地址范围的简单并发控制机制，可在保持并行性的同时实现安全更新。我们在各种稀疏数据结构的串行和并行基准测试中评估 Terminus。 Terminus 在 CPU 基线上将性能提高了 gmean $7.4\times$ ，这表明 Terminus 可以加速细粒度的读取和写入，这在以前的稀疏结构加速器中是不可能实现的。

items.title: VGA: Hardware Accelerator for Scalable Long Sequence Model Inference.
items.abstract: Effectively modeling relationships between distant elements in a long input sequence is an important task that remains challenging to this day. The state-of-the-art models for processing sequential data are self-attention-based transformer models. However, the computational complexity of self-attention is quadratic to the input sequence length, which often becomes the limiting factor in scaling the sequence length. Recently, state space model (SSM)-based global convolution models, which replace attention with convolution, have been found to be effective for modeling long sequences, with a sub-quadratic complexity using Fast Fourier Transform (FFT). However, they show sub-optimal performance on data-parallel accelerators like GPU, due to the regions of extremely low compute utilization with memory bandwidth-bound operations. To address this inefficiency, this paper proposes the Vandermonde matrix Generating Accelerator (VGA), a custom accelerator that performs FFT-based convolution in an area/power-efficient manner. VGA introduces Complex number Compute Units (CCUs) to fully utilize the high on-chip SRAM bandwidth, and parameters are generated on the fly to drastically reduce the required SRAM capacity. VGA achieves 76×(48×) higher area (power) efficiency than NVIDIA A100 GPU when executing the global convolution operator of H3, a state-of-the-art SSM-based model.
items.abstract_zh: 对长输入序列中相距较远的元素之间的关系进行有效建模是一项重要任务，至今仍然具有挑战性。用于处理顺序数据的最先进的模型是基于自注意力的变压器模型。然而，自注意力的计算复杂度与输入序列长度成二次方，这往往成为缩放序列长度的限制因素。最近，人们发现基于状态空间模型（SSM）的全局卷积模型（用卷积代替注意力）对于长序列建模非常有效，并且使用快速傅里叶变换（FFT）具有次二次复杂度。然而，由于内存带宽限制操作的计算利用率极低的区域，它们在 GPU 等数据并行加速器上表现出次优性能。为了解决这种低效率问题，本文提出了范德蒙矩阵生成加速器（VGA），这是一种定制加速器，能够以面积/功率高效的方式执行基于 FFT 的卷积。 VGA 引入了复数计算单元 (CCU)，以充分利用高片上 SRAM 带宽，并动态生成参数，从而大幅减少所需的 SRAM 容量。在执行 H3（一种最先进的基于 SSM 的模型）的全局卷积算子时，VGA 的面积（功率）效率比 NVIDIA A100 GPU 高 76 倍（48 倍）。

items.title: PIM-MMU: A Memory Management Unit for Accelerating Data Transfers in Commercial PIM Systems.
items.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) has emerged as a promising solution for accelerating memory-intensive workloads as they provide high memory bandwidth to the processing units. This approach has drawn attention not only from the academic community but also from the industry, leading to the development of real-world commercial PIM devices. In this work, we first conduct an in-depth characterization on UPMEM's general-purpose PIM system and analyze the bottlenecks caused by the data transfers across the DRAM and PIM address space. Our characterization study reveals several critical challenges associated with DRAM↔PIM data transfers in memory bus integrated PIM systems, for instance, its high CPU core utilization, high power consumption, and low read/write throughput for both DRAM and PIM. Driven by our key findings, we introduce the PIM-MMU architecture which is a hardware/software co-design that enables energy-efficient DRAM↔PIM transfers for PIM systems. PIM-MMU synergistically combines a hardware-based data copy engine, a PIM-optimized memory scheduler, and a heterogeneity-aware memory mapping function, the utilization of which is supported by our PIM-MMU software stack, significantly improving the efficiency of DRAM↔PIM data transfers. Experimental results show that PIM-MMU improves the DRAM↔PIM data transfer throughput by an average $4.1\times$ and enhances its energy-efficiency by $4.1\times$ , leading to a $2.2\times$ end-to-end speedup for real-world PIM workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 已成为加速内存密集型工作负载的一种有前途的解决方案，因为它们为处理单元提供了高内存带宽。这种方法不仅引起了学术界的关注，也引起了工业界的关注，促进了实际商业 PIM 设备的发展。在这项工作中，我们首先对 UPMEM 的通用 PIM 系统进行深入的表征，并分析跨 DRAM 和 PIM 地址空间的数据传输造成的瓶颈。我们的特性研究揭示了与内存总线集成 PIM 系统中 DRAM↔PIM 数据传输相关的几个关键挑战，例如 DRAM 和 PIM 的高 CPU 内核利用率、高功耗以及低读/写吞吐量。在我们的主要发现的推动下，我们引入了 PIM-MMU 架构，它是一种硬件/软件协同设计，可为 PIM 系统实现节能的 DRAM↔PIM 传输。 PIM-MMU协同结合了基于硬件的数据复制引擎、PIM优化的内存调度程序和异构感知内存映射功能，其利用由我们的PIM-MMU软件堆栈支持，显着提高了DRAM↔PIM数据传输的效率。实验结果表明，PIM-MMU 将 DRAM↔PIM 数据传输吞吐量平均提高 $4.1\times$ ，将能源效率提高 $4.1\times$ ，导致 $2.2\times$ 实际 PIM 工作负载的端到端加速。

items.title: Rearchitecting a Neuromorphic Processor for Spike-Driven Brain-Computer Interfacing.
items.abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) are electrophysiological devices (e.g., electrode arrays) that connect the brain to a computer. They offer neuroscientific and neurological innovations by utilizing a dedicated processor for continuous BCI signal processing. Recent studies propose a scaled-up BCI that adopts an order of magnitude larger number of electrodes to more precisely interface with the brain. As the BCI scales, utilizing a spike-driven processor emerges as an alternative processing method, where the BCI offloads computations to the processor upon detecting spikes. However, the processor design for spike-driven processing has been relatively unexplored compared to that of the continuous processor. In this work, we propose NeuroLobe, a flexible and efficient processor design for spike-driven processing. The key idea is to utilize a neuromorphic processor to take advantage of its event-driven computing nature. We carefully rearchitect the existing neuromorphic system for the purpose of flexibly and efficiently deploying the BCI algorithms. First, we extend the instruction set architecture of the existing neuromorphic processor to flexibly deploy representative spike-driven BCI algorithms. Second, we redesign the connection controller and execution path to improve the performance. Third, we design a custom synchronization unit for scalable processing. Fourth, we implement a custom software stack to minimize load imbalance among the cores. Lastly, we design a multitask controller to simultaneously process multiple algorithms. We evaluate NeuroLobe on four representative BCI algorithms with 11 configurations. Evaluation results show that NeuroLobe surpasses CPU and GPU in terms of speed and energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 脑机接口（BCIs）是将大脑连接到计算机的电生理设备（例如电极阵列）。他们利用专用处理器进行连续 BCI 信号处理，提供神经科学和神经学创新。最近的研究提出了一种扩大的脑机接口，采用数量级更多的电极来更精确地与大脑连接。随着 BCI 的扩展，利用尖峰驱动处理器成为一种替代处理方法，其中 BCI 在检测到尖峰时将计算卸载到处理器。然而，与连续处理器相比，尖峰驱动处理的处理器设计相对尚未被探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了 NeuroLobe，一种用于尖峰驱动处理的灵活高效的处理器设计。关键思想是利用神经形态处理器来利用其事件驱动的计算特性。我们仔细地重新架构了现有的神经形态系统，以便灵活高效地部署 BCI 算法。首先，我们扩展了现有神经形态处理器的指令集架构，以灵活部署代表性的脉冲驱动BCI算法。其次，我们重新设计了连接控制器和执行路径以提高性能。第三，我们设计了一个用于可扩展处理的定制同步单元。第四，我们实现了自定义软件堆栈，以最大限度地减少内核之间的负载不平衡。最后，我们设计了一个多任务控制器来同时处理多个算法。我们在四种具有 11 种配置的代表性 BCI 算法上评估 NeuroLobe。评估结果显示，NeuroLobe 在速度和能效方面超越了 CPU 和 GPU。

items.title: PyPIM: Integrating Digital Processing-in-Memory from Microarchitectural Design to Python Tensors.
items.abstract: Digital processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures mitigate the memory wall problem by facilitating parallel bitwise operations directly within the memory. Recent works have demonstrated their algorithmic potential for accelerating data-intensive applications; however, there remains a significant gap in the programming model and microarchitectural design. This is further exacerbated by aspects unique to memristive PIM such as partitions and operations across both directions of the memory array. To address this gap, this paper provides an end-to-end architectural integration of digital memristive PIM from a high-level Python library for tensor operations (similar to NumPy and PyTorch) to the low-level microarchitectural design. We begin by proposing an efficient microarchitecture and instruction set architecture (ISA) that bridge the gap between the low-level control periphery and an abstraction of PIM parallelism. We subsequently propose a PIM development library that converts high-level Python to ISA instructions and a PIM driver that translates ISA instructions into PIM micro-operations. We evaluate PyPIM via a cycle-accurate simulator on a wide variety of benchmarks that both demonstrate the versatility of the Python library and the performance compared to theoretical PIM bounds. Overall, PyPIM drastically simplifies the development of PIM applications and enables the conversion of existing tensor-oriented Python programs to PIM with ease.
items.abstract_zh: 内存数字处理 (PIM) 架构通过直接在内存中促进并行按位操作来缓解内存墙问题。最近的工作已经证明了它们在加速数据密集型应用程序方面的算法潜力；然而，编程模型和微架构设计仍然存在很大差距。忆阻 PIM 特有的方面（例如跨存储器阵列两个方向的分区和操作）进一步加剧了这种情况。为了解决这一差距，本文提供了数字忆阻 PIM 的端到端架构集成，从用于张量运算的高级 Python 库（类似于 NumPy 和 PyTorch）到低级微架构设计。我们首先提出一种高效的微架构和指令集架构 (ISA)，以弥合低级控制外围设备和 PIM 并行性抽象之间的差距。随后，我们提出了一个将高级 Python 转换为 ISA 指令的 PIM 开发库，以及一个将 ISA 指令转换为 PIM 微操作的 PIM 驱动程序。我们通过周期精确的模拟器在各种基准上评估 PyPIM，这些基准都证明了 Python 库的多功能性以及与理论 PIM 范围相比的性能。总体而言，PyPIM 极大地简化了 PIM 应用程序的开发，并使现有的面向张量的 Python 程序轻松转换为 PIM。

items.title: TMiner: A Vertex-Based Task Scheduling Architecture for Graph Pattern Mining.
items.abstract: Graph pattern mining discovers important patterns in graphs. It is both computation-and memory-intensive, characterized by numerous set operations and irregular memory access. Graph pattern mining inherently involves a large number of independent tasks, helping to alleviate its computational bottleneck through parallel processing. However, after exploiting parallelism, memory access will become the primary bottleneck. Existing parallelism strategies severely result in redundant and inefficient memory access, making the performance memory bounded. This paper proposes TMiner, a graph pattern mining architecture with optimized memory performance through a systematically designed software-hardware stack. TMiner fundamentally reduces redundant memory access of parallel graph pattern mining in three aspects. (1) TMiner leverages a task partitioning approach based on disjoint neighbor vertex set access, reducing redundant memory access between PEs. (2) TMiner utilizes the global neighbor vertex information to coalesce the access from different neighbor vertex subsets at compilation time, which not only reduces redundant memory access within a task but also improves the data locality. (3) TMiner adopts a data reuse-oriented task scheduling mechanism, which dynamically migrates and merges tasks with similar memory access patterns, reducing redundant memory access within a PE at runtime. A DIMM-based near-memory architecture that exploits the DRAM's internal bandwidth is elaborated for high-performance graph pattern mining, which incorporates the proposed memory access optimization techniques and an extended ISA. Compared with the state-of-the-art software and hardware baselines, TMiner significantly improves the performance.
items.abstract_zh: 图模式挖掘发现图中的重要模式。它是计算和内存密集型的，其特点是大量的集合操作和不规则的内存访问。图模式挖掘本质上涉及大量独立任务，有助于通过并行处理缓解其计算瓶颈。然而，利用并行性之后，内存访问将成为主要瓶颈。现有的并行策略严重导致冗余且低效的内存访问，使得内存性能受到限制。本文提出了 TMiner，这是一种通过系统设计的软硬件堆栈优化内存性能的图模式挖掘架构。 TMiner从三个方面从根本上减少了并行图模式挖掘的冗余内存访问。 (1) TMiner 利用基于不相交邻居顶点集访问的任务划分方法，减少了 PE 之间的冗余内存访问。 (2) TMiner利用全局邻居顶点信息在编译时合并来自不同邻居顶点子集的访问，这不仅减少了任务内的冗余内存访问，而且提高了数据局部性。 (3)TMiner采用面向数据重用的任务调度机制，动态迁移和合并具有相似内存访问模式的任务，减少运行时PE内的冗余内存访问。为高性能图形模式挖掘而精心设计了一种利用 DRAM 内部带宽的基于 DIMM 的近内存架构，该架构结合了所提出的内存访问优化技术和扩展的 ISA。与最先进的软件和硬件基线相比，TMiner 显着提高了性能。

items.title: LUCIE: A Universal Chiplet-Interposer Design Framework for Plug-and-Play Integration.
items.abstract: Multi-chip modules, recently also known as chiplets, are a promising approach to building large-scale silicon in the post-Moore's Law era. While chiplet-based designs offer advantages like averting manufacturing yield issues and enabling heterogeneous integration, there has not been a standard for seamless communication and integration of chiplets. This paper proposes LUCIE, a Lightweight Universal Chiplet-Interposer Ecosystem that provides a universal, modular, and reconfigurable framework for plug-and-play integration of chiplets. The key ideas behind LUCIE include a flexible 2D grid-based interposer design and a placement tool to aid chiplet integration. Its lightweight design and direct connection between chiplets allowed designs to fit into the LUCIE framework with minimal effort while achieving great performance. Performance analysis showed that LUCIE's performance is comparable to custom interposers, up to twice as fast as NoC-on-NoP designs in certain scenarios, and around 20% more power efficient than NoC-on-NoP designs. Compared to using custom interposers, cost analysis showed that LUCIE saves up to 18.9% of manufacturing cost, $60,000 of Non-Recurring Engineering cost, and 30 weeks less time-to-market. The LUCIE framework is more flexible and ideal for more topologies, such as 2D mesh and star topology. With the development of a novel, graph-based placement algorithm, LUCIE significantly reduces design complexity compared to monolithic and custom interposer-based chiplet systems while providing a high degree of modularity and reconfigurability.
items.abstract_zh: 多芯片模块，最近也称为小芯片，是后摩尔定律时代构建大规模硅片的一种有前景的方法。虽然基于小芯片的设计具有避免制造良率问题和实现异构集成等优势，但目前还没有小芯片无缝通信和集成的标准。本文提出了 LUCIE，一种轻量级通用 Chiplet-Interposer 生态系统，它为 Chiplet 的即插即用集成提供了通用、模块化和可重新配置的框架。 LUCIE 背后的关键思想包括灵活的基于网格的 2D 中介层设计和有助于小芯片集成的放置工具。其轻量级设计和小芯片之间的直接连接使设计能够以最小的努力融入 LUCIE 框架，同时实现出色的性能。性能分析表明，LUCIE 的性能与定制中介层相当，在某些情况下速度最高可达 NoC-on-NoP 设计的两倍，并且比 NoC-on-NoP 设计的能效高出约 20%。与使用定制中介层相比，成本分析表明，LUCIE 可节省高达 18.9% 的制造成本、60,000 美元的非经常性工程成本，并将上市时间缩短 30 周。 LUCIE 框架更加灵活，适合更多拓扑，例如 2D 网格和星形拓扑。随着新型基于图形的布局算法的开发，与单片和基于定制中介层的小芯片系统相比，LUCIE 显着降低了设计复杂性，同时提供了高度的模块化和可重构性。

items.title: STAR: Sub-Entry Sharing-Aware TLB for Multi-Instance GPU.
items.abstract: NVIDIA's Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) technology enables partitioning GPU computing power and memory into sep-arate hardware instances, providing complete isolation including compute resources, caches, and memory. However, prior work identifies that MIG does not partition the last-level TLB (i.e., L3 TLB), which remains shared among all instances. To enhance TLB reach, NVIDIA GPUs reorganized the TLB structure with 16 sub-entries in each L3 TLB entry that have a one-to-one mapping to the address translations for 16 pages of size 64 KB located within the same 1 MB aligned range. Our comprehensive investigation of address translation efficiency in MIG identifies two main issues caused by L3 TLB sharing interference: (i) it results in performance degradation for co-running applications, and (ii) TLB sub-entries are not fully utilized before eviction. Based on this observation, we propose STAR to improve the utilization of TLB sub-entries through dynamic sharing of TLB entries across multiple base addresses. STAR evaluates TLB entries based on their sub-entry utilization to optimize address translation storage, dynamically adjusting between a shared and non-shared state to cater to current demand. We show that STAR improves overall performance by an average of 28.7% across various multi-tenant workloads.
items.abstract_zh: NVIDIA 的多实例 GPU (MIG) 技术能够将 GPU 计算能力和内存划分到单独的硬件实例中，从而提供包括计算资源、缓存和内存在内的完全隔离。然而，之前的工作表明 MIG 不会对最后一级 TLB（即 L3 TLB）进行分区，该 TLB 仍然在所有实例之间共享。为了增强 TLB 的覆盖范围，NVIDIA GPU 重新组织了 TLB 结构，每个 L3 TLB 条目中有 16 个子条目，这些子条目与位于相同 1 MB 对齐范围内的 16 个大小为 64 KB 的页面的地址转换进行一对一映射。我们对 MIG 中地址转换效率的全面调查发现了由 L3 TLB 共享干扰引起的两个主要问题：(i) 它导致共同运行的应用程序的性能下降，以及 (ii) TLB 子条目在驱逐之前未得到充分利用。基于这一观察，我们提出STAR通过跨多个基地址动态共享TLB条目来提高TLB子条目的利用率。 STAR 根据子条目利用率评估 TLB 条目，以优化地址转换存储，在共享和非共享状态之间动态调整以满足当前需求。我们发现，STAR 在各种多租户工作负载中将整体性能平均提高了 28.7%。

items.title: Fusion-3D: Integrated Acceleration for Instant 3D Reconstruction and Real-Time Rendering.
items.abstract: Recent breakthroughs in Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) based 3D reconstruction and rendering have spurred the possibility of immersive experiences in augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR). However, current NeRF acceleration techniques are still inadequate for real-world AR/VR applications due to: 1) the lack of end-to-end pipeline acceleration support, which causes impractical off-chip bandwidth demands for edge devices, and 2) limited scalability in handling large-scale scenes. To tackle these limitations, we have developed an end-to-end, scalable 3D acceleration framework called Fusion-3D, capable of instant scene reconstruction and real-time rendering. Fusion-3D achieves these goals through two key innovations: 1) an optimized end-to-end processor for all three stages of the NeRF pipeline, featuring dynamic scheduling and hardware-aware sampling in the first stage, and a shared, reconfigurable pipeline with mixed-precision arithmetic in the second and third stages; 2) a multi-chip architecture for handling large-scale scenes, integrating a three-level hierarchical tiling scheme that minimizes inter-chip communication and balances workloads across chips. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of Fusion-3D in facilitating real-time, energy-efficient 3D reconstruction and rendering. Specifically, we tape out a prototype chip in 28nm CMOS to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed end-to-end processor. Extensive simulation based on the on-silicon measurements demonstrates a $\mathbf{2.5}\times$ and $\mathbf{6}\times$ throughput improvement in training and inference, respectively, compared to state-of-the-art accelerators. Furthermore, to assess the multi-chip architecture, we integrate four chips into a single PCB as a prototype. Further simulation results show that the multi-chip system achieves a $\mathbf{7.3}\times$ and $\mathbf{6.5}\times$ throughput improvement in training and inference, respectively, over the Nvidia 2080Ti GPU. To the best of our knowledge, Fusion-3D is the first to achieve both instant (≤ 2 seconds) 3D reconstruction and real-time (≥ 30 FPS) rendering, while only requiring the bandwidth of the most commonly used USB port (0.625 GB/s, 5 Gbps) in edge devices for off-chip communication.
items.abstract_zh: 基于神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的 3D 重建和渲染的最新突破激发了增强现实和虚拟现实 (AR/VR) 中沉浸式体验的可能性。然而，当前的 NeRF 加速技术仍然不足以满足现实世界的 AR/VR 应用，因为：1）缺乏端到端管道加速支持，这导致边缘设备的片外带宽需求不切实际；2）处理大规模场景时的可扩展性有限。为了解决这些限制，我们开发了一种名为 Fusion-3D 的端到端、可扩展的 3D 加速框架，能够进行即时场景重建和实时渲染。 Fusion-3D 通过两项关键创新实现了这些目标：1）针对 NeRF 管道所有三个阶段的优化端到端处理器，在第一阶段具有动态调度和硬件感知采样功能，在第二和第三阶段具有混合精度算术的共享、可重新配置管道； 2）用于处理大规模场景的多芯片架构，集成三级分层切片方案，最大限度地减少芯片间通信并平衡芯片间的工作负载。大量实验验证了 Fusion-3D 在促进实时、节能的 3D 重建和渲染方面的有效性。具体来说，我们在 28nm CMOS 中流片了原型芯片，以评估所提出的端到端处理器的有效性。基于硅上测量的广泛模拟演示了 $\mathbf{2.5}\times$ 和 $\mathbf{6}\times$ 与最先进的加速器相比，训练和推理的吞吐量分别提高。此外，为了评估多芯片架构，我们将四个芯片集成到单个 PCB 中作为原型。进一步的仿真结果表明，多芯片系统实现了 $\mathbf{7.3}\times$ 和 $\mathbf{6.5}\times$ 训练和推理吞吐量分别比 Nvidia 2080Ti GPU 有所提高。据我们所知，Fusion-3D 是第一个实现即时（≤ 2 秒）3D 重建和实时（≥ 30 FPS）渲染的技术，同时只需要边缘设备中最常用的 USB 端口（0.625 GB/s，5 Gbps）的带宽即可进行片外通信。

items.title: Beehive: A Flexible Network Stack for Direct-Attached Accelerators.
items.abstract: Direct-attached accelerators, where application accelerators are directly connected to the datacenter network via a hardware network stack, offer substantial benefits in terms of reduced latency, CPU overhead, and energy use. However, a key challenge is that modern datacenter network stacks are complex, with interleaved protocol layers, network management functions, and virtualization support. To operators, network feature agility, diagnostics, and manageability are often considered just as important as raw performance. By contrast, existing hardware network stacks only support basic protocols and are often difficult to extend since they use fixed processing pipelines. We propose Beehive, a new, open-source FPGA network stack for direct-attached accelerators designed to enable flexible and adaptive construction of complex network functionality in hardware. Application and network protocol elements are modularized as tiles over a network-on-chip substrate. Elements can be added or scaled up/down to match workload characteristics with minimal effort or changes to other elements. Flexible diagnostics and control are integral, with tooling to ensure deadlock safety. Our implementation interoperates with standard Linux TCP and UDP clients, with a 4x improvement in end-to-end RPC tail latency for Linux UDP clients versus a CPU-attached accelerator. Beehive is available at https://github:com/beehive-fpga/beehive
items.abstract_zh: 直连加速器（应用程序加速器通过硬件网络堆栈直接连接到数据中心网络）在减少延迟、CPU 开销和能源使用方面具有显着的优势。然而，一个关键的挑战是现代数据中心网络堆栈非常复杂，具有交错的协议层、网络管理功能和虚拟化支持。对于运营商来说，网络功能敏捷性、诊断和可管理性通常被认为与原始性能一样重要。相比之下，现有的硬件网络堆栈仅支持基本协议，并且由于使用固定的处理管道而通常难以扩展。我们提出了 Beehive，这是一种用于直连加速器的新型开源 FPGA 网络堆栈，旨在实现硬件中复杂网络功能的灵活和自适应构建。应用程序和网络协议元素被模块化为片上网络基板上的图块。可以添加或按比例放大/缩小元素，以匹配工作负载特征，而无需花费太多精力或对其他元素进行更改。灵活的诊断和控制是不可或缺的，并配有确保死锁安全的工具。我们的实现可与标准 Linux TCP 和 UDP 客户端进行互操作，与 CPU 连接的加速器相比，Linux UDP 客户端的端到端 RPC 尾部延迟提高了 4 倍。 Beehive 位于 https://github:com/beehive-fpga/beehive

items.title: ActiveN: A Scalable and Flexibly-Programmable Event-Driven Neuromorphic Processor.
items.abstract: At present, most neuromorphic chips utilize custom circuits and/or on-chip memory to achieve neural computations and parameter storage. However, with the diversified development of brain-inspired applications, this approach faces significant challenges regarding programming flexibility and scalability. To address these issues, we propose a RISC-V-based many-core neuromorphic architecture, ActiveN. Each neuro-core is equipped with an active-message-enabled micro-architecture to support the event-driven programming model of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), and the memory subsystem is enhanced to identify sparse data and forward them directly. These mechanisms significantly mitigate the impact of memory latency on performance to enable the storage of synapse data in off-chip (or off-die) bulk storages (e.g., DRAMs, HBMs), which not only improve storage scalability but also increase computing density. Furthermore, the core's instruction set is customized to include a compact and complete set of fixed-and floating-point computing instructions, supporting various neural models and SNN computation algorithms flexibly. End-to-end prototype testing demonstrates that, compared to a state-of-the-art chip based on custom circuitry and on-chip SRAM that also supports event-driven operations, ActiveN can integrate over 10x more processing units (512) with strong scalability to fully utilize memory bandwidth. Additionally, it achieves 7.9 times the performance of this counterpart and 96.6 times the performance of an NVIDIA A100 GPU, while maintaining flexible programmability.
items.abstract_zh: 目前，大多数神经形态芯片利用定制电路和/或片上存储器来实现神经计算和参数存储。然而，随着类脑应用的多元化发展，这种方法在编程灵活性和可扩展性方面面临着巨大的挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于 RISC-V 的多核神经形态架构 ActiveN。每个神经核心都配备了支持活动消息的微架构，以支持尖峰神经网络（SNN）的事件驱动编程模型，并且内存子系统得到增强，可以识别稀疏数据并直接转发它们。这些机制显着减轻了内存延迟对性能的影响，从而能够将突触数据存储在片外（或芯片外）大容量存储（例如 DRAM、HBM）中，这不仅提高了存储可扩展性，还提高了计算密度。此外，该内核指令集经过定制，包含一套紧凑而完整的定点和浮点计算指令，灵活支持各种神经模型和SNN计算算法。端到端原型测试表明，与基于定制电路和支持事件驱动操作的片上 SRAM 的最先进芯片相比，ActiveN 可以集成超过 10 倍的处理单元 (512)，并且具有强大的可扩展性，以充分利用内存带宽。此外，它的性能是同类产品的 7.9 倍，是 NVIDIA A100 GPU 性能的 96.6 倍，同时保持灵活的可编程性。

items.title: Polymorphic Error Correction.
items.abstract: In this paper, we propose a new memory error correction scheme, Polymorphic ECC, based on a novel idea of redundancy polymorphism for error correction. With redundancy polymorphism, we can use the check bits, i.e., parity bits in traditional ECC, to correct errors from different fault models. For example, the error correction procedure will use the same redundancy value for single-bit errors, double-bit errors, ChipKill, and others. As a result, Polymorphic ECC corrects more errors than traditional codes, which typically target a single fault model or require multiple redundancies for multi-fault model support, leading to higher storage overheads. Our construction is very compact, allowing us to embed an inlined cryptographic message authentication code (MAC) with each cacheline, ensuring data integrity and near 100% error detection without needing any extra storage. The MAC, further permits iterative correction among the many supported fault models. In the paper, we show that the novel combination of redundancy polymorphism with iterative correction, corrects errors due to fault models not covered by traditional codes and guarantees data integrity with up to 60-bit MACs while using 64-byte cachelines and standard 40-bit DDR5 memory channels.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们基于冗余多态性纠错的新思想，提出了一种新的内存纠错方案——多态ECC。 With redundancy polymorphism, we can use the check bits, i.e., parity bits in traditional ECC, to correct errors from different fault models. For example, the error correction procedure will use the same redundancy value for single-bit errors, double-bit errors, ChipKill, and others.因此，多态 ECC 比传统代码纠正更多错误，传统代码通常针对单个故障模型或需要多个冗余来支持多故障模型，从而导致更高的存储开销。我们的结构非常紧凑，允许我们在每个缓存行中嵌入内联的加密消息身份验证代码 (MAC)，从而确保数据完整性和近 100% 的错误检测，而不需要任何额外的存储。 The MAC, further permits iterative correction among the many supported fault models.在本文中，我们展示了冗余多态性与迭代校正的新颖组合，可以纠正由于传统代码未涵盖的故障模型而导致的错误，并在使用 64 字节缓存行和标准 40 位 DDR5 内存通道时保证高达 60 位 MAC 的数据完整性。

items.title: Veiled Pathways: Investigating Covert and Side Channels Within GPU Uncore.
items.abstract: With the emergence of GPUs as first-class compute engines, more concentrated focus has been put into covert and side channel discovery in these architectures. However, most of the covert and side channels uncovered on GPUs to date are rooted in “GPU cores”, which include computational cores, cache and core interconnects, but they do not consider “GPU uncore”, which include non-computational engines, GPU DRAM, host-G PU links and inter-GPulinks. In this paper, we delve into the less-explored domains of GPU uncore, unveiling four novel leakage sources for covert and side channel exploitation: (1) GPU DRAM frequency scaling; (2) NVENC utilization; (3) NVDEC utilization; (4) NVJPEG utilization. What makes these covert and side channels interesting is that they all take effect under the GPU MPS mode - which fractionalizes GPU cores and GPU memory on both desktop-scale and server-scale GPUs. Furthermore, our study reevaluates PCI-e bandwidth allocation on GPUs. Notably, we have engineered covert and side channel capable of bypassing GPU MIG isolation - a mechanism implemented by NVIDIA to physically segregate hardware resources on server-scale GPUs. Our research showcases concrete examples of these covert and side channels, highlighting their potency in breaching system security, all achieved without necessitating root privileges. This underscores the practical implications and urgency of addressing these vulnerabilities in GPU architectures.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 GPU 作为一流计算引擎的出现，人们更加关注这些架构中的隐蔽通道和侧通道发现。然而，迄今为止在GPU上发现的大多数隐蔽通道和侧通道都植根于“GPU核心”，其中包括计算核心、缓存和核心互连，但他们没有考虑“GPU非核心”，其中包括非计算引擎、GPU DRAM、主机-G PU链接和内部GPulink。在本文中，我们深入研究了 GPU 非核心的较少探索的领域，揭示了用于隐蔽和侧通道利用的四个新颖的​​泄漏源：（1）GPU DRAM 频率缩放； (2)NVENC的利用； (3)NVDEC的利用； (4)NVJPEG的利用。这些隐蔽通道和旁路通道的有趣之处在于，它们都在 GPU MPS 模式下生效，这种模式在桌面级和服务器级 GPU 上对 GPU 核心和 GPU 内存进行细分。此外，我们的研究重新评估了 GPU 上的 PCI-e 带宽分配。值得注意的是，我们设计了能够绕过 GPU MIG 隔离的隐蔽和侧通道，这是 NVIDIA 实现的一种机制，用于在服务器规模的 GPU 上物理隔离硬件资源。我们的研究展示了这些隐蔽和侧面通道的具体示例，强调了它们破坏系统安全的潜力，所有这些都无需 root 权限即可实现。这凸显了解决 GPU 架构中这些漏洞的实际影响和紧迫性。

items.title: Localizing the Tag Comparisons in the Wakeup Logic to Reduce Energy Consumption of the Issue Queue.
items.abstract: There is a high demand to reduce the energy consumption of microprocessors. Among resources in a processor, the issue queue is one of the largest energy consumers, with much of the energy being consumed by the wakeup logic. The wakeup logic comprises the content-addressable memory, where tag comparisons are performed for all entries. Such global tag comparisons consume an appreciable amount of energy. This paper proposes a scheme called segmenting wakeup logic (SegWU), where the wakeup logic is segmented logically. An instruction is dispatched to an available entry in the segment selected based on the partial bits of the source tag values. At the wakeup time, a broadcast destination tag is compared only in the segment that corresponds to the partial bits of the destination tag value. Tag comparisons are not performed in the other segments. This localization of tag comparisons reduces the energy consumption. Our evaluation results for SPEC2017 benchmark programs show that SegWU reduces the number of tag comparisons by 90.3%. This lowers the IQ energy consumption, and the net reduction excluding the secondary effect (activity lowering of the front-end) and overhead is 3.0% in the base core energy consumption with no performance degradation. The overall energy reduction including the secondary effect is 6.9%.
items.abstract_zh: 人们迫切需要降低微处理器的能耗。在处理器的资源中，发出队列是最大的能源消耗者之一，其中大部分能源被唤醒逻辑消耗。唤醒逻辑包括内容可寻址存储器，其中对所有条目执行标签比较。这种全局标签比较消耗了大量的能量。本文提出了一种称为分段唤醒逻辑（SegWU）的方案，其中唤醒逻辑是逻辑分段的。指令被分派到基于源标签值的部分位选择的段中的可用条目。在唤醒时，仅在与目标标签值的部分位相对应的段中比较广播目标标签。不在其他段中执行标签比较。标签比较的这种本地化减少了能量消耗。我们对 SPEC2017 基准程序的评估结果表明，SegWU 将标签比较次数减少了 90.3%。这降低了 IQ 能耗，排除次要影响（前端活动降低）和开销后，基本核心能耗净减少 3.0%，且性能没有下降。包括二次效应在内的总体节能效果为 6.9%。

items.title: Looking into the Black Box: Monitoring Computer Architecture Simulations in Real-Time with AkitaRTM.
items.abstract: Computer architecture simulators are essential for validating novel chip designs. However, they often provide little transparency during execution. This opaqueness limits the ability of users to identify issues during the simulation, leading to both wasted computational and human time. We address these issues by providing an intuitive user experience during simulation execution. Particularly, we reveal the status of executions and allow users to control the execution of a computer architecture simulator through AkitaRTM, an interactive web-based tool for real-time monitoring of computer architecture simulations. We based its design on the design workflow inefficiencies experienced by computer architects when using simulations. We demonstrate AkitaRTM's utility through two case studies, the second leading to a patch in the simulator. Additionally, we conducted a user study with computer architects, aiming to validate AkitaRTM. We found that, in addition to solving the observed problems, AkitaRTM also provided an educational benefit by making simulators more transparent to users. Based on these findings, we reflect upon the design of AkitaRTM and provide guidance for future human-centered tools in this space.
items.abstract_zh: 计算机架构模拟器对于验证新颖的芯片设计至关重要。然而，它们在执行过程中往往缺乏透明度。这种不透明性限制了用户在模拟过程中识别问题的能力，导致计算和人力时间的浪费。我们通过在模拟执行期间提供直观的用户体验来解决这些问题。特别是，我们揭示了执行状态，并允许用户通过 AkitaRTM（一种基于网络的交互式工具，用于实时监控计算机体系结构模拟）来控制计算机体系结构模拟器的执行。我们的设计基于计算机架构师在使用模拟时遇到的设计工作流程效率低下的问题。我们通过两个案例研究展示了 AkitaRTM 的实用性，第二个案例研究导致了模拟器中的补丁。此外，我们与计算机架构师进行了一项用户研究，旨在验证 AkitaRTM。我们发现，除了解决观察到的问题之外，AkitaRTM 还通过使模拟器对用户更加透明来提供教育效益。基于这些发现，我们反思了 AkitaRTM 的设计，并为该领域未来以人为本的工具提供指导。

items.title: Secure Prefetching for Secure Cache Systems.
items.abstract: Transient execution attacks like Spectre and its vari-ants can cause information leakage through a cache hierarchy. There are two classes of techniques that mitigate speculative execution attacks: delay-based and invisible speculation. Invisible speculation-based techniques like GhostMinion are the high-performing yet secure techniques that mitigate all kinds of spec-ulative execution attacks. Similar to a cache system, hardware prefetchers can also cause speculative information leakage. To mitigate it, GhostMinion advocates on-commit prefetching on top of strictness ordering in the cache system. Our experiments show that the GhostMinion cache system interacts negatively with the hardware prefetchers leading to redundant traffic between different levels of cache. This traffic causes contention and increases the miss latency leading to performance loss. Next, we observe that on-commit prefetching enforced by GhostMinion leads to nerformance loss as it affects the prefetcher timeliness. We perform the first thorough analysis of the interaction between state-of-the-art prefetching techniques and the secure cache system. Based on this, we propose two microarchitectural solutions that ensure high performance while designing secure prefetchers on top of secure cache system. The first solution detects and filters redundant traffic when updating the cache hierarchy non-speculatively. The second solution ensures the timeliness of the prefetcher to compensate for the delayed triggering of prefetch requests at commit, resulting in a secure yet high-performing prefetcher. Overall, our enhancements are secure and provide synergistic interactions between hardware prefetchers and a secure cache system. Our experiments show that our filter consistently improves the performance of secure cache systems like GhostMinion in the presence of state-of-the-art prefetchers (by 1.9% for single-core and 19.0% for multi-core for the top-performing prefetcher). We see a synergistic behavior of the filter with our proposed secure prefetcher, which leads to a further increase in performance by 6.3% and 23.0% (over the top-performing prefetcher), for single-core and multi-core systems, respectively. Our enhancements are extremely lightweight incurring a storage overhead of 0.59 KB per core.
items.abstract_zh: Transient execution attacks like Spectre and its vari-ants can cause information leakage through a cache hierarchy. There are two classes of techniques that mitigate speculative execution attacks: delay-based and invisible speculation.像 GhostMinion 这样的基于隐形推测的技术是高性能且安全的技术，可以减轻各种推测执行攻击。 Similar to a cache system, hardware prefetchers can also cause speculative information leakage. To mitigate it, GhostMinion advocates on-commit prefetching on top of strictness ordering in the cache system.我们的实验表明，GhostMinion 缓存系统与硬件预取器产生负面交互，导致不同级别缓存之间出现冗余流量。 This traffic causes contention and increases the miss latency leading to performance loss. Next, we observe that on-commit prefetching enforced by GhostMinion leads to nerformance loss as it affects the prefetcher timeliness. We perform the first thorough analysis of the interaction between state-of-the-art prefetching techniques and the secure cache system.基于此，我们提出了两种微架构解决方案，在确保高性能的同时，在安全缓存系统之上设计安全预取器。 The first solution detects and filters redundant traffic when updating the cache hierarchy non-speculatively.第二种解决方案确保预取器的及时性，以补偿提交时预取请求的延迟触发，从而形成安全且高性能的预取器。 Overall, our enhancements are secure and provide synergistic interactions between hardware prefetchers and a secure cache system.我们的实验表明，在存在最先进的预取器的情况下，我们的过滤器持续提高了 GhostMinion 等安全缓存系统的性能（对于性能最佳的预取器，单核提高了 1.9%，多核提高了 19.0%）。我们看到过滤器与我们提出的安全预取器的协同行为，这使得单核和多核系统的性能分别进一步提高了 6.3% 和 23.0%（超过性能最佳的预取器）。 Our enhancements are extremely lightweight incurring a storage overhead of 0.59 KB per core.

items.title: Over-Synchronization in GPU Programs.
items.abstract: The performance of GPU (Graphics Processing Unit)-accelerated functions affects a large spectrum of modern software. Efficiently synchronizing across thousands of concurrent threads is critical to the performance of GPU programs. GPU vendors have introduced advanced programming constructs, e.g., scopes, for efficiently synchronizing within a chosen subset of threads. However, programmers must explicitly employ them, where applicable, to benefit from such features. We demonstrate how GPU programs can leave performance on the table by failing to fully harness advanced synchronization features in modern GPUs - leading to over-synchronization. We discover three different variants of over-synchronization observed in real-world applications. We then build a tool, ScopeAdvice, to find cases of over-synchronization in CUDA programs. Avoiding reported over-synchronization improves the performance of several GPU applications by up to 55%.
items.abstract_zh: GPU（图形处理单元）加速功能的性能影响着许多现代软件。有效同步数千个并发线程对于 GPU 程序的性能至关重要。 GPU 供应商引入了高级编程结构（例如作用域），用于在选定的线程子集中进行高效同步。但是，程序员必须在适用的情况下明确使用它们才能从这些功能中受益。我们演示了 GPU 程序如何因未能充分利用现代 GPU 中的高级同步功能而导致性能下降，从而导致过度同步。我们发现了在实际应用中观察到的三种不同的过度同步变体。然后，我们构建了一个工具 ScopeAdvice，用于查找 CUDA 程序中过度同步的情况。避免报告的过度同步可将多个 GPU 应用程序的性能提高高达 55%。

items.title: FuseMax: Leveraging Extended Einsums to Optimize Attention Accelerator Design.
items.abstract: Attention for transformers is a critical workload that has recently received significant ‘attention’ as a target for custom acceleration. Yet, while prior work succeeds in reducing attention's memory-bandwidth requirements, it creates load imbalance between operators that comprise the attention computation (resulting in severe compute under-utilization) and requires on-chip memory that scales with sequence length (which is expected to grow over time). This paper ameliorates these issues, enabling attention with nearly 100% compute utilization, no off-chip memory traffic bottlenecks, and on-chip buffer size requirements that are independent of sequence length. The main conceptual contribution is to use a recently proposed abstraction―the cascade of Einsums― to describe, formalize, and taxonomize the space of attention algorithms that appear in the literature. In particular, we show how Einsum cascades can be used to infer non-trivial lower bounds on the number of passes a kernel must take through its input data, which has implications for either required on-chip buffer capacity or memory traffic. We show how this notion can be used to meaningfully divide the space of attention algorithms into several categories and use these categories to inform our design process. Based on the above characterization, we propose FuseMax―a novel mapping and binding of attention onto a spatial array-style architecture.
